ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness index entry */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of happiness based on score */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the measurement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent to which the country belongs */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "eco_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding happiness index entry */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in the country */,
  "economy_description" TEXT /* Description of economic conditions or factors */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Gini coefficient or other measure of income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eco_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES happiness_index ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_dynamics" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family dynamics entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding happiness index entry */,
  "family_score" REAL /* Score representing family dynamics in the country */,
  "marriage_rate" REAL /* Rate of marriages per 1,000 people */,
  "divorce_rate" REAL /* Rate of divorces per 1,000 people */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Rate of live births per 1,000 people */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_dynamics_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES happiness_index ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding happiness index entry */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in the country */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Number of infant deaths per 1,000 live births */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on healthcare */,
  "physician_density" REAL /* Number of physicians per 1,000 people */,
  "hospital_beds" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1,000 people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES happiness_index ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_scores" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom score entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding happiness index entry */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Score representing freedom in the country */,
  "political_freedom" REAL /* Score representing political freedom */,
  "civil_liberties" REAL /* Score representing civil liberties */,
  "press_freedom" REAL /* Score representing press freedom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_scores_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES happiness_index ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity_scores" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity score entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding happiness index entry */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Score representing generosity in the country */,
  "donation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that donates to charity */,
  "volunteer_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that volunteers */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Score representing the availability of social support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_scores_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES happiness_index ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust_scores" (
  "trust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trust score entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding happiness index entry */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Score representing trust in government */,
  "corruption_perception" REAL /* Score representing the perception of corruption */,
  "government_effectiveness" REAL /* Score representing the effectiveness of government */,
  "judicial_independence" REAL /* Score representing the independence of the judiciary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trust_scores_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES happiness_index ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of happiness measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES happiness_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key required to access the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
